{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Galactic Union combat armor
| introduced = lh-02-the-engineer
}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The protagonist uses [[Galactic Union combat armor]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c47">''The Engineer'', chapter 47</ref>}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Sola Kalter]]'s armor is a perfected version of standard [[Galactic Union combat armor]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c21">''The Knight'', chapter 21</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon artifacts]]
